claim_summary: Warfarin-vitamin K, thyroid medication-calcium/iron, metformin-B12, anticoagulant-omega3/ginkgo/vitamin E, and MAOI-tyramine cases should route to professional-confirmation boundaries.
recommended_action: Keep as deterministic boundary routing until MFDS/KDCA/official drug-label review creates reviewed rule cards.

claim_summary: Smoker context with beta-carotene or high-vitamin-A supplement requests should not receive allow/ban guidance from the LLM.
recommended_action: Route to boundary wording and promote only after NIH ODS, KDCA, MFDS, or reviewed clinical-source confirmation.
source_doc: docs/Nutrition-docs/07-core-algorithm.md lines around smoker beta-carotene caution; core-algorithm intake plan

claim_summary: Frequent alcohol use with vitamin A single-ingredient products or acetaminophen should be treated as professional-confirmation boundary content.
recommended_action: Keep as boundary routing; verify official Korean and drug-label sources before adding user-facing cautions.

claim_summary: Thyroid disease, CKD, liver disease, systemic steroid use, and diabetes medication classes can materially change body-weight trajectories.
recommended_action: Disable Hall-lite automatic long-term prediction or attach low-confidence warnings until reviewed clinical rules exist.

claim_summary: Korean obesity class 3 handling at BMI 35+ needs explicit review against local obesity guidance.
recommended_action: Add as source-backed backlog; do not change BMI categories until KSSO source is reviewed.

claim_summary: Waist-to-height ratio may be useful as a supporting risk indicator but is not implemented.
recommended_action: Keep as backlog and require source review plus request-schema impact review before implementation.

claim_summary: Tanaka 2001 HRmax is already an option candidate while guide_220_age remains the compatibility default.
recommended_action: Preserve default behavior; review whether Tanaka should become user-selectable or source-noted only.

claim_summary: Pregnancy, elderly, and chronic-disease nutrition routing requires reviewed KDRIs/KDCA source cards before user-facing personalization.
recommended_action: Keep current KDRIs lookup stable and add reviewed routing only after source metadata is complete.

claim_summary: Hall dynamic modeling is a long-term enhancement and current Hall-lite is a simplified conservative simulation, not a full model reproduction.
recommended_action: Keep feature-gated; add validation tasks before stronger accuracy claims.

claim_summary: METs and cadence could improve activity scoring beyond steps and heart-rate proxy inputs.
recommended_action: Track as future deterministic algorithm backlog; do not change current API contract.

claim_summary: Smoking and alcohol modifiers for activity scoring are not implemented and need clinical rationale before use.
recommended_action: Keep as draft backlog; avoid scoring penalties or rewards without source review.

claim_summary: Long-term personalization correction requires confirmed records and explicit validation before changing deterministic recommendations.
recommended_action: Keep inside learning backlog; do not let draft research directly affect user-facing advice.
